steps.title: Find the target meaning
steps.content: The key signal is the phrase “eagerly anticipating the moment when he would be at home again.” The word “eagerly” shows strong positive emotion toward a future event, while “the moment when” indicates something that hasn't yet occurred. The Mole intensely desires a future arrival.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
Choice C, “Looking forward to,” expresses this forward-looking desire for a future moment.

The other three fail: “Describing” and “Instructing” are unrelated actions, while “Getting ahead of” means surpassing rather than eagerly desiring.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
